data.product_name: De'Longhi La Specialista Maestro Espresso Machine
top_flaws: The auto-tamping lever occasionally leaves grounds uneven, requiring manual leveling anyway.
The milk frothing sensor is hyper-sensitive and throws error codes if a single drop of dried milk blocks the steam tip.
The machine takes nearly 15 minutes to fully pre-heat the active temperature stabilization elements before the first shot.
